milestones.description: Gather detailed business requirements, define user personas, and create user stories.
acceptance_criteria: Client signs off on Requirements Document

milestones.description: Create low-fi wireframes, iterate to high-fi mockups, and build an interactive prototype.
acceptance_criteria: Client approves high-fi mockups for all screens
Prototype demonstrates navigation flow without errors

milestones.description: Implement the UI in React using the approved design system, ensuring responsive layout and state management.
deliverables: GitHub repository URL with frontend code
acceptance_criteria: UI matches approved mockups within 5px tolerance on desktop and tablet
ESLint passes with 0 errors, unit test coverage >= 80%

milestones.description: Develop RESTful API services, design the relational database schema, and implement authentication.
deliverables: GitHub repository URL with backend code
acceptance_criteria: All CRUD endpoints return correct HTTP status codes
Authentication flow conforms to OAuth2/JWT standards
Average response time < 200ms on staging

milestones.description: Conduct functional, regression, and performance testing, fix defects, and deploy to production.
acceptance_criteria: All critical and high severity bugs resolved
Application accessible at production URL with 0 downtime

milestones.description: Define the background tracking services and battery optimization strategy.
acceptance_criteria: GPS ping frequency meets battery constraints

milestones.description: Implement Google Maps/Mapbox integration with live vehicle markers.
acceptance_criteria: Marker moves smoothly without lag

milestones.description: Build the admin dashboard for fleet managers to monitor all active vehicles.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard loads within 2s with 50 active vehicles

milestones.description: End-to-end testing on device, performance profiling, and Play Store / App Store submission.
acceptance_criteria: No critical bugs on physical device testing
App approved by store review

milestones.description: Develop 30 days of high-engagement content and creative assets.
acceptance_criteria: All brand colors match guidelines

milestones.description: Configure Meta and LinkedIn ad sets for target demographics.
acceptance_criteria: Tracking pixels verified on staging

milestones.description: Go live with all ad sets and content, monitor performance metrics daily.
acceptance_criteria: CTR meets or exceeds 2% benchmark
Weekly report delivered every Monday

milestones.description: Compile full campaign results, insights, and recommendations for next cycle.
acceptance_criteria: Client signs off on final report
